basic_details.job_title: AAV Gurmura Sonbhadra Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Atal Residential School Gurmura Sonbhadra has officially announced the PGT Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The recruitment notification has been released for eligible candidates with qualifications including M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT), MCA, or M.E./M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with minimum 50% marks along with B.Ed. Degree or equivalent integrated B.Ed. qualification. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 50 years can submit their applications through offline mode on or before 17 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 01-07-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT)/MCA or M.E./M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with minimum 50% marks from recognized institution AND B.Ed. Degree or 3 years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. or 4 years integrated degree with B.Ed. component with minimum 50% marks from NCTE recognized institution
qualification.details: M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) or MCA with at least 50% marks. OR M.E./M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with at least 50% marks. AND B.Ed. Degree with at least 50% marks from an NCTE recognized institution. OR 3 years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. with at least 50% marks. OR 4 years integrated degree including B.Ed. component with at least 50% marks.

selection_process: Merit based on Educational Qualifications Weightage Personal Interaction/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AAV Gurmura Sonbhadra PGT Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: Sonbhadra.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AAV Gurmura Sonbhadra Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) or MCA with at least 50% marks. OR M.E./M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with at least 50% marks. AND B.Ed. Degree with at least 50% marks from an NCTE recognized institution. OR 3 years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. with at least 50% marks. OR 4 years integrated degree including B.Ed. component with at least 50% marks.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 01-07-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.text: Merit based on Educational Qualifications Weightage Personal Interaction/Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AAV Gurmura Sonbhadra PGT Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: Sonbhadra.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AAV Gurmura Sonbhadra PGT Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AAV Gurmura Sonbhadra PGT Computer Teacher post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the PGT Computer Teacher position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) or MCA, or M.E./M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with at least 50% marks, along with a B.Ed. degree or equivalent from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 50 years as of 1st July 2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the PGT Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty) role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 36,000 per month for this contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made for the PGT Computer Teacher post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on the weightage of educational qualifications and a personal interaction or interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification states that there is no application fee for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via Speed Post or Registered Post.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Atal Residential School Gurmura Sonbhadra (AAV Gurmura Sonbhadra).

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the PGT Computer Teacher post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the PGT Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sonbhadra district, Sonbhadra.nic.in. Links are provided in the Important Links section.
